name: actors
description: Roster of responsibilities owned by named actors.
purpose: Use to show 'who owns what' across a process, codebook, or org chart. Two-column layout: actor on left, responsibilities on right.

rows.description: One row per actor. Lead each li with **Actor Name.** then a short responsibility summary.

skeleton:
<!-- _class: actors -->

## Who owns each part of the process.

- **First actor.** Owns the first part of the lifecycle.
- **Second actor.** Owns the second part.
- **Third actor.** Owns the third part.
- **Fourth actor.** Owns the fourth part.
